app.name: AINA
app.medical_disclaimer: AINA mooy jumtukaay bu yebal xibaar. Li nu xam du wuutu xam-xamu doktoor.

auth.signup_success: Kont bi binduwa na ! Xoolal sa email 📧
auth.terms: Boo toppee, yaangi nangu say njàngat ak say seetlu.
auth.dev_mode_label: Seetlu — seetal ci lu amul kont
auth.guest_note: Sa donnée yi dañuy nekk rekk ci jumtukay bii

onboarding.measurements_subtitle: Soxla nañu ko ngir toppatoo ay màgg.
onboarding.country_subtitle: Kaleendar bu vaksin bi dina tollu ak réew bi.
onboarding.vaccines_subtitle: Laalal vaksin yi {{name}} jël ba noppi ngir toppatoo ju rafet.
onboarding.vaccines_too_young: {{name}} ndaw na ba pare, vaksin dafa yokk doomu.
onboarding.weight_range_error: Ci diggante 0.5 ak 6 kg ngir liir bu juddu
onboarding.height_range_error: Ci diggante 30 ak 65 cm ngir liir bu juddu

growth_interpretation.normal_message: {{metric}}u {{name}} mi ngi wër bu baax ci diggante xale yi ak i wàllam. Toppal ni nga tëb!
growth_interpretation.watch_message: {{name}} mi ngi tuuti ci kaw walla suuf diggu, waaye mi ngi ci biir barabu normal. Dañu koy xool ci visite bu ñëw.
growth_interpretation.alert_low_message: {{metric}} mi ngi ci suufu 3e percentile. Du lu tiit, waaye hevit doktoor dafay xam lu gën.
growth_interpretation.alert_high_message: {{metric}} mi ngi ci kaw 97e percentile. Fekke doktoor bi ngir xam lu gën.
growth_interpretation.curve_break_message: Courbe bu {{name}} jar na ay bànd diggante ñaari natt. Waxal ko doktoor gaaw.

red_flag_checker.header_subtitle: Xamal li nga gis, du diagnostic — guide rekk la.
red_flag_checker.observation_placeholder: M.y. Tàng 38,5 li dale ci suba, liir bañ biberon, jooy yu amul màgg…
red_flag_checker.observation_hint: Su la ñëwee bu baax (jamono, tàngaay, jëf), IA bi dafa gën a jubale.
red_flag_checker.disclaimer: ⚕️ Xibaar bii du wuutu xam-xamu doktoor xale yi.

chat.online_status: mu ngi fi · tontu yu àgge
chat.welcome: Jamm ak jamm, yaayu {{name}} 👋 Man maa ngi tudd AINA IA, ndimbalu app bi. Laajal ma ci wér-gu-yaram, nelaw, lekk walla àggaliku bu liir.
chat.welcome_disclaimer: ⚕️ Man du ma wuutu sa doktoor xale — boo xamul, demal doktoor.
chat.limit_reached: Jëkk nga 10 laaj — tambali beneen walla ñëw ci kanam.
chat.suggestion_cow_milk: Naka la ma dugal meew nag ?
chat.suggestion_sleep: Sama liir nelawul bu baax ci guddi, am ndigël ?
chat.suggestion_fever: Kañ la mëna demal doktoor su am tàng ?

ai_recipe.ingredients_placeholder: dugub, mangoro, meew, pomme de terre mboq, karoot…
ai_recipe.ingredients_hint: Séparer ak virgule — walla bàyyil lépp ngir ndigël bu jam.

profile_form.confirm_delete_body: Ay donnée yu {{name}} yépp dañu leen di far bu dul génn.

dashboard.recent_activity: Jëf yi ko moomee ci kanam
dashboard.care_kit_hint: Natt garab, ndigëlu tàng, xayma poop

vaccines.disclaimer: Xibaar yii àgge lañ. Saa doktoor moo la tax a xam lu gën a rafet.
vaccines.how_body_defense_html: Yaramu sa liir am na xare buy aar bu bees : sistemu aaram. Waaye xare boobu dafa soxla jàng bu baax ay noon yi.
vaccines.how_vaccine_role_html: Vaksin bi dafay wone ci yaram melokaan bu du metti ci mikrob bi. Bés bu mikrob bu dëgg ñëwee, xarey aaru yi matal nañu ba pare.
vaccines.how_herd_immunity_html: Joxe vaksin sa liir, moo di it aar yeneen : ñiy am jafe-jafe, maami bu ñëw, soxna yu biir, mag ñi.
vaccines.how_side_effects_note: Njàng yi koy topp (tàng mu yomb, diis) dañu yomb te dañuy jeex. Dañuy néew lool ci kanamu feebar yi ñu aar.

growth.no_data: Amul natt bu nu bind. Yokkal bi mujj.

teeth.tap_hint: Laalal bëñ ngir seetlu ne génn na

development.red_flags_intro: Boo xam ne {{name}} am na benn walla ñu bari ci njël yii, wax ko doktoor bi :
development.disclaimer: Xale ju nekk dafa màgg ak jamono – xibaar yi ay tànk lañu, doktoor rekk a man a wax.

health_report.footer: Téere bi AINA defar — Toppatoo liir ci Dr Helminah Randriamananoro

nutrition.title: Lekk

foods.foods_in_range: {{count}} lekk yu ñu dugal ci diggante bi
foods.detail_conservation_note: Denc puree yu ñu defar ci kër ci frigo ba 48 waxtu (ci fësaay bu tëj) walla benn weer ci congélateur. Tàngalaat ci gën a njariñ bi nga lekk, du ñaar yoon.

nutrition.no_favorites_hint: Laalal xol bi ngir denc recette yi nga bëgg.
nutrition.empty_shopping_hint: Defaral plan lekk ngir liste bi génn.

journal.title: Téere
journal.hero_kicker: Bis bu nekk am na njariñ
journal.empty: Amul dara bindewul ci bis bii

care.title: Fagaru

dose.max_interval: Saa 6 waxtu lépp ({{count}} yoon/24 waxtu) · teggale ak tàng ga.
dose.ibuprofen_warning: Mu jurul bala 3 weer, walla boo amee mbéex walla daqoon.
dose.next_allowed: Natt bi nu man a jox

fever.baby_under_3m_body: Tàng bu ≥ 38°C dafa gaaw. Demal doktoor gëwëlu.
fever.when_emergency: Kañ la ñu demal doktoor gaaw ?

care.disclaimer: Xibaar yii àgge rekk la. Xoolal notice bi, jël doktoor boo xam xam-xamu. Gaaw : SAMU 15 / 1515.

bcg.why: Dafa aar liir bi ci doomu-jàngoro bu rëy, mooy daj poumon yi.
bcg.disease: Tuberculose doomu-jàngoro la bu dëj ci poumon yi (ba ci yeneen xarnu). Dafay jaar ci sëq.
bcg.risk: Liir bu ndaw, tuberculose mën na def wér-gu-yaram bu rëy (méningite, pulmonaire).
bcg.side_effects: Dafay xëkk-xëkkatu ci benn bërëb, ak njëgg mu tuuti. Ay luy nekk la.

hepb.why: Dafay aar liir bi ci virus bu di yàq foie ci yëngu-yëngu gu yàgg.
hepb.disease: Hépatite B virus la bu dëj ci foie. Man na nekk jàngoro yu yàgg, ëpp cirrhose walla cancer.
hepb.risk: Mën na jox jox diggante yaay ak liir ci juddu walla ci kër.
hepb.side_effects: Diis mu tuuti ci bërëb bi, tàng mu yomb mën am.

polio.why: Dafay téey doomu-jàngoro bi mën na tëye ba ba fàww.
polio.disease: Poliomyélite virus la bu di daj sistem nerveux bi, mën na tëye tànk, loxo, walla noyyi.
polio.risk: Amul faj — vaksin rekk mooy téye ko. Dañu koy am ci yenn réew.
polio.side_effects: Tàng mu yomb, ay luy rekk.

penta.why: Benn vaksin bu di aar juróom doomu-jàngoro yu rëy.
penta.disease: Diphtérie (sotti), Tétanos (fas), Coqueluche (sëq gu rëy), Hépatite B, Haemophilus (méningite).
penta.risk: Ñoom ñépp ay doomu-jàngoro yu mën rey liir bi lañ.
penta.side_effects: Tàng (paracétamol mën nekk), diis, liir dafay mer 24-48 waxtu.

hexa.why: Dafay aar ci juróom-benn doomu-jàngoro ci benn dugg.
hexa.disease: Difteri, Tetanos, Sëq gu tar, Polio, Hib (méningite ci atidoha), Hépatite B.
hexa.risk: Su amul vaksin, ay doomu-jàngoro yu rëy lañ ba mën rey.
hexa.side_effects: Tàng, diis ci bërëb bi, liir mer 24-48 waxtu. Paracétamol su am tàng.

pneumo.why: Dafay aar poumon yi ak cervau bi ci microbe bu dëk.
pneumo.disease: Pneumocoque dafa def otites, pneumonies, méningites ci xale.
pneumo.risk: Méningites pneumococciques mën def ay feebar ci cervau.

rota.why: Dafay téye biir-biir bu yàgg bu mën delcëre liir bi.
rota.disease: Rotavirus dafay def gastro-entérites yu rëy ci liir yu ndaw.
rota.risk: Jotay yomb di ndaw — lu gën a rëy di dugg hopital ci gastro laata ay 2 att.
rota.side_effects: Vaksin ci gémmiñ la, ay luy rekk, yenn saay ay fèy yu tooy.

ror.why: Kaar kenn aar ci ñetti doomu-jàngoro yu mën jaar yomb.
ror.disease: Rougeole (xuxur + tàng bu rëy), Oreillons (kër yu jul), Rubéole (dëk bu nga biir).
ror.risk: Rougeole mooy menn ci doomu-jàngoro ci xale yi mën rey ëpp su amul vaksin.
ror.side_effects: Tàng ak xuxur yu tuuti 7-10 bis ginnaaw vaksin (dëgg-dëgg la).

fievre-jaune.why: Dafay aar doomu-jàngoro bi yomb jox ci yamb, mi ngi rëy ci Afrik.
fievre-jaune.disease: Fièvre jaune dafay jur tàng, jaunisse ak mën daj foie ak ay rein.
fievre-jaune.risk: Doomu-jàngoro bi mën rey. Am ci réew yu bari ci Afrik.
fievre-jaune.side_effects: Tàng mu yomb 1-2 bis ginnaaw, tayeel.

meningo-a.why: Dafay aar ci méningites yu "ceinture méningitique" Afrik.
meningo-a.disease: Méningocoque A dafay def méningites yu yomb rey.
meningo-a.risk: Ay épidémies ci Sahel, xale ñooy lu gën a koy jàpp.

meningo-c.why: Dafay aar ci méningocoque C (méningite / septicémie).
meningo-c.disease: Fëbbar méningocoque C : méningite walla fëbbar ci dereet gépp.
meningo-c.risk: Mën rey ci ay waxtu. Vaksin bi baax na lool.
meningo-c.side_effects: Diis ci bërëb bi, ay luy rekk.

vita.why: Dafay sampe kàrangeen ak téye jafe-jafe gu gëstu.
vita.disease: Vitamine A bu neewee dafay def gis-guddi ak téye kàrangeen.
vita.risk: Bari na ci yenn bërëb yu amul ay lekk yu bari.
vita.side_effects: Amul ci dose bu dëgg-dëgg. Ci gémmiñ la.

4.label: 4 weer
signs: Toppatul bët-bët yi ak lu jëm
Walaatul ci ay coow yu rëy

18.label: 18 weer
signs: Wax la gën a néew 5 kaddu
Xam la na nekkul yëgle yu yomb (joxal, kaay)

24.label: 24 weer
signs: Po po yu nu tuuti bonne

teeth_tips: 🧊 Benn anneau nif mu sedd dafay baax ci bëñ yu metti
👆 Masse la bëñ gi ak baraam mu set
💊 Paracétamol su am tàng bu tuuti ak poussée bëñ
🍌 Jox lekk yu sedd (compote bu sedd, banaanaa)
🚫 Bañal gels anesthésiants — baaxul laata 2 att

steps.title: Xool bu baax jàngoro bi
steps.desc: Liir bi ndax dafa sëq ? Mën joo ay coow ? Su fekkee waaw, jàpp ko mu sëq.

steps.title: Yoonu biir
steps.desc: Défal liir bi ci sa loxo, bopp bi suuf lu gën yaram, jàpp mu ngi jawu.

steps.title: Juróom tak-tak ci diggaante
steps.desc: Juróomi tak-tak yu rëy diggante omoplates ak loxo bi.

steps.title: Juróom lajj ci kër-kër
steps.desc: Delloo liir bi ci biir. Def juróom lajj ci diggante sternum ak ñaari baraam.

steps.title: Toppal walla wooteel fajkat
steps.desc: Soppi tak-tak ak lajj. Su fekkee sotti gi yàgg, wooteel gaaw SAMU (15 / 1515).

fever_advice.mild: Summil yëre, maye ndox li ci ëllëg-ëllëg, xamal. Paracétamol dëgg-dëgg du nekk.
fever_advice.moderate_template: Paracétamol {{doseMg}} mg saa 6 waxtu lépp. Sedalal néeg bi (18-20°C).
fever_advice.high: Demal doktoor gaaw, rawatina su liir < 3 weer walla tàng > 48 waxtu.
emergency_signs: Xënté yu dellu walla bañ lekk
Noyi gu amul xalaat, jooy yu amul faj

stool_types.desc: Meew jaay : poop bu bàjj, ak fëy gu yomb.
Biberon walla dugg lekk : gëna kàll, gëna tàq.
Yenn saay baax la. Su yàggee : lactose ju bari walla jafe-jafe biir.
Mën ne am na jafe-jafe foie. Demal doktoor gaaw.
Demal gaaw. Mën allergie, boru, walla lu beneen.
Mën ne am na dereet ci biir. Demal gaaw.

stool_note: 💧 Biir-biir = ëpp 3 poop yu yomb ci bes. Risk jotay : maye ndox bu bari, xamal couche, demal su amul faj ci 24 waxtu.

storage_rules.title: Purée ci kër
storage_rules.detail: Fësaay hermétique tëjaat saa bi mu noppi

storage_rules.title: Nen bu ñor gu mat
storage_rules.detail: Warul ñor gu mat ngir liir

storage_golden_rules: Réchauffer benn yoon, ba xol (70°C bu nekk ngir yàpp/jën).
Sanni lépp lu liir bi tambali lekk (ay téer) ginnaaw 1 waxtu.
Bind daté sa fanomanana ci pots.

hygiene_sections.title: Laata togg
items: Raxasal sa loxo ak saabu ci 20 segondes
Set plan de travail + ay jumtukaay ak ndox mu tàng savon
Raxasal fruits ak légumes ak ndox mu set (brosse su mu bari derma)
Moytuleen jumtukaay yu garab — yägal inox walla plastik

hygiene_sections.title: Stérilisation biberon (0-4 weer)
items: Témbal ëpp biberon bi (tétine, anneau, capuchon)
Raxasal benn-benn ak ndox mu tàng savon + raxas
Stériliser ak ndox mu diis 10 mn WALLA stérilisateur
Xool moom ci benn serviette bu set

hygiene_sections.title: Défar biberon meew liir
items: Toppatoo dose : 1 mesurette ci 30 ml ndox
Teg ndox li ba noppi poudre, dara deneen
Testal tangaay ci sa kaw-njaxas (wayy, du tàng)

hygiene_sections.title: Togg bu mat ngir liir
items: Togg ak vapeur : denc vitamines (lu gën)
Bul xorom, bul suukër, bul lem laata 12 weer
Bul épices yu tàng (piment, poivre) laata 2 att

hygiene_temperature_note: Tàngaay bu rafet : lekk liir bi wara nekk ay bu sedd (37°C). Du tàng, du sedd laata 12 weer.

conservation.title: Denc
conservation.tap_hint: Laalal tableau yi ngir gis jotay

doctor.university: Daara ju kawe Cheikh Anta Diop (UCAD), Ndakaaru
doctor.about_aina_body: AINA, ci làkk-malagasy, dafa tekki « Dund ak Sawu ». App bii juddu nañ ci bëgg-bëggu Dr Helminah ci doktoorlu ak ngir mu man a jàppandal toppatoo liir ci yaay ñépp, Afrik ak ci àdduna sépp.

about.title: Ci mbirum Dr Helminah
about.subtitle: Doktoor xale · Bi sos AINA
about.bio: Dr Helminah Randriamananoro dafay ànd ak njaboot yi ci toppatoo wér-gu-yaram ak lekk liir. AINA dafa juddoo ci xam-xamam ci doktoor xale.
